name: Mrs Fields Peanut Butter Oatmeal Ranch Cooky
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flours, baking powder, and oats. Mix well with a wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, beat sugar and butter with an electric mixer at medium speed until a grainy paste forms.
4. Blend together the peanut butter, honey, eggs, and vanilla extract in the large bowl.
5. Scrape down sides of the bowl.
6. Add the flour mixture, raisins, and sunflower seeds to the large bowl. Mix at low speed just until combined.
7. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, 2 inches apart.
8. Bake for 23-25 minutes, or until bottoms are golden brown.
9. Immediately transfer cookies with a spatula to a cool, flat surface.
